title: heterostemma pingtaoi
intro: Heterostemma pingtaoi is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Heterostemma pingtaoi include its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Heterostemma pingtaoi can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
